'''Mo' Moolee Rah''' or "Mo' Money" in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], was a small open market in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It offered used weapons and technical boutiques, and also offered weapon maintenance and customizing services. It was located in the city's [[Tar Mass]] neighborhood.

{{Company-stub}}
